description: Read records from a ServiceNow table (incident / change_request / sc_request / sys_user / cmdb_ci / custom tables) into a DataFrame asset. Goes through the ServiceNow Table API with pagination, encoded-query filtering, field selection, and basic-auth or bearer-token (OAuth) auth.

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Name of the asset to create

instance_env_var.label: Instance Env Var
instance_env_var.description: Env var with the ServiceNow instance subdomain (e.g. 'mycompany' or 'dev123456'). Subdomain only — no https:// or .service-now.com.

username_env_var.label: Username Env Var
username_env_var.description: Env var with ServiceNow username (basic auth). Required unless bearer_token_env_var is set.

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Env var with ServiceNow password (basic auth). Required unless bearer_token_env_var is set.

bearer_token_env_var.label: Bearer Token Env Var
bearer_token_env_var.description: Env var with ServiceNow OAuth bearer token. When set, basic-auth fields are ignored.

table.label: Table
table.description: ServiceNow table name (e.g. incident, change_request, sc_request, sys_user, cmdb_ci, or a custom table).

sysparm_query.label: Sysparm Query
sysparm_query.description: ServiceNow encoded query string filter (e.g. 'state=approved^priority=1'). See ServiceNow docs on encoded queries.

sysparm_fields.label: Sysparm Fields
sysparm_fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. Defaults to all fields if unset.

sysparm_display_value.label: Sysparm Display Value
sysparm_display_value.description: Reference-field display: 'false' = sys_id only (raw), 'true' = display value only, 'all' = both.

page_size.label: Page Size
page_size.description: Records fetched per API call (sysparm_limit). Default 1000.

max_records.label: Max Records
max_records.description: Cap on total records returned. None = no cap.

verify_ssl.label: Verify SSL
verify_ssl.description: Enable TLS verification (disable only for self-signed dev instances).

name: ServiceNow Ingestion
